calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2003 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2002 Continued To Jan-27-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up On Scd 218 At 09:00 On November 4,2002.
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar this day for hearing on default prove-up. Present: Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia L. Van Steenberge.Jennifer Chon, Esq. represented the plaintiff. Witness Patrick Banks was sworn and examined. The following exhibits were marked for identification: 1) Lease dated November 2,2002 against Music Buddah, Inc.; 2) Unpaid Rent Calculation and 3) Future Rent Calculation. Good cause appearing, the Court grants judgment as follows: Principal: $1,176,657.60 consisting of $275,025.20 in total; unpaid rent from March 1. 2002 to October 31,2002; 4901,024.96 in total amount of future rent and $607.50 in attorney's fees and costs.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2002 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-25-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2002 Continued To Oct-11-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
